description: Test directive splices inside quoted strings (original cases + new splice cases)

assertions.description: Directive splice inside string has correct scope
Directive splice inside string still has string parent scope
Second outer directive has correct scope
Directive splice inside string (with trailing text) has correct scope
Text after directive splice still has string scope
New splice (braces): outer directive has correct scope
Splice (braces): directive splice inside string has correct scope
Splice (braces): directive splice inside string still has string parent scope
Splice (braces): opening brace after splice directive is highlighted
Splice (braces): closing brace after splice directive is highlighted
Splice (parens): outer directive has correct scope
Splice (parens): splice directive with argument group has correct scope
Splice (parens): opening parenthesis after splice directive is highlighted
Splice (parens): numeric literal inside splice argument group is highlighted
Splice (parens): closing parenthesis after splice directive is highlighted
Splice (parens): splice directive in line still has string parent scope
